posts.author: rudimartins (Rudi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please update how the mirror columns show in tables! We don’t see the totals below. I need to create duplicated columns with formulas just to show the totals of mirror columns! This creates a lot of complexity to manage unnecessary columns.

What are you trying to achieve

Simplify the management of the boards and overall complexity!
